title: adenolinum nervosum
side_effects: Adenolinum nervosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing muscle weakness, respiratory problems, and even paralysis in extreme cases. Numbness or tingling sensations in the extremities, as well as dizziness and lightheadedness, may also occur. In rare instances, improper use of adenolinum nervosum can lead to anaphylaxis, a severe and potentially life-threatening allergic reaction. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause irreversible damage to the nervous system.
